race.comment: SCOOBARTIE (4) is knocking on the door and finds the right race. He's just found one better in both starts this time in at Swan Hill and will kick up from the inside gate in what looks a winnable affair. CODENAME (1) has finished third in all three runs this time in, trying hard at Donald on heavy ground last start. He looks a logical danger. SCUSIES (9) resumes. She mixed her form last time in but showed glimpses of ability and can be better this time around. Look for him to be hitting the line. JASMINA (8) has been okay in two runs back on heavy ground and can challenge for a top three finish. SPARKLING AWARD (10) struggled at Pakenham last time but was thereabouts fresh and can improve.
